 {"id":"beads_rust-ndl","title":"JSONL discovery + metadata.json handling","description":"# JSONL Discovery + metadata.json Handling

## Purpose
Implement safe JSONL file selection and metadata.json startup config, matching bd rules.

## JSONL Selection Rules
1. Prefer `issues.jsonl` if present.
2. Else fall back to `beads.jsonl` (legacy).
3. Never treat `deletions.jsonl`, `interactions.jsonl`, or merge artifacts
   (`beads.base.jsonl`, `beads.left.jsonl`, `beads.right.jsonl`) as the main JSONL.
4. If none exists, default to `issues.jsonl` for writing.

## Path Inputs
- `BEADS_JSONL` env var (highest priority for JSONL path).
- `metadata.json` field `jsonl_export` (relative to `.beads/`).
- If DB path is overridden, derive JSONL path from DB directory.

## metadata.json
- Read before DB open to determine DB filename + JSONL filename.
- If missing, use defaults (`beads.db`, `issues.jsonl`).

## Acceptance Criteria
- Discovery rules exclude merge artifacts and legacy deletion logs.
- `metadata.json` overrides respected.
- Safe default when no JSONL exists.

## Tests
- Fixtures with multiple JSONL candidates.
- metadata.json override path test.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":0,"created_at":"2026-01-16T07:04:01.200921392Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-17T03:45:57.075448655Z","closed_at":"2026-01-17T03:45:57.075448655Z","close_reason":"JSONL discovery fully implemented in config/mod.rs: BEADS_JSONL env var, DB override, metadata.json override, file discovery (issues.jsonl > beads.jsonl), exclusion of merge artifacts. 15+ tests covering all cases."}
 {"id":"beads_rust-ne8","title":"E2E integration suite with detailed logging","description":"# E2E Integration Suite

## Scope
- End-to-end CLI workflows covering init/create/update/list/show/ready/dep/label/comments/sync.
- Capture detailed logs: command args, env, timing, stdout/stderr, and exit codes.

## Requirements
- Use real temp dirs and SQLite DBs.
- No mocks or fake FS.
- Logs written to per-test artifacts for debugging.

## Acceptance
- cargo test runs E2E scenarios deterministically.
- Logs are easy to read and include reproduction steps.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":0,"created_at":"2026-01-16T16:19:31.791241141Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-16T17:42:04.677820765Z","closed_at":"2026-01-16T17:42:04.677820765Z","close_reason":"E2E integration suite complete: all 6 child tasks (harness, lifecycle, deps/labels/comments, errors, queries, sync) are implemented and passing. 14+ E2E tests covering init/create/update/list/show/close/dep/label/comments/sync/error workflows with detailed logging."}

 {"id":"beads_rust-nz0","title":"ID Resolution & Prefix Matching","description":"# ID Resolution & Prefix Matching

## Purpose
Implement classic partial ID resolution and prefix validation used by show/update/close/dep/etc.

## Partial ID Resolution
Order:
1. Exact ID match (`SearchIssues` by IDs).
2. Normalize: if missing prefix, prepend `issue_prefix-` and retry exact match.
3. Substring match on hash portion across all prefixes.
4. Ambiguity => error with candidate list.

## Prefix Validation
- Explicit IDs must match `issue_prefix` or `allowed_prefixes` unless `--force`.
- Trailing hyphen in prefix input is accepted; stored prefix has **no** trailing hyphen.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Matches bd resolution order and ambiguity handling.
- Hierarchical IDs (`bd-abc.1`) supported.

## Tests
- Exact, prefix, hash-only, substring matching.
- Ambiguous match error lists candidates.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","estimated_minutes":0,"created_at":"2026-01-16T06:17:23.123240361Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-16T14:01:13.998727366Z","closed_at":"2026-01-16T14:01:13.998727366Z","close_reason":"Implementation complete in src/util/id.rs. Added IdResolver, ResolverConfig, MatchType, ResolvedId, find_matching_ids, resolve_id with comprehensive tests. Note: codebase has unrelated compilation issues from other agents WIP that block cargo test."}
